title: Why Thank You! + Winner
excerpt: WOW. First off, I am blown away by all your kind words about Yes, Please . I read each and every comment and probably had a silly grin on my face while doing so. Thank you thank you!! I heard…
body:
WOW. First off, I am blown away by all your kind words about Yes, Please. I read each and every comment and probably had a silly grin on my face while doing so. Thank you thank you!! I heard that there's a chance Yes, Please will be in stores as soon as February! In the mean time, you can shop my other collections online at Two Peas In a Bucket and Simon Says Stamp and your local stores!

The winner for the collection is: Joscie says: January 8, 2013 at 5:24 pm i love it all especially the stamps, the dimensional stickers, the stitched vellum and the paper piercing templates. SUPER AWESOME.

CONGRATS Joscie! American Crafts will send your box as soon as the product arrives in the warehouse! Thanks to all who entered and we'll see you again on Monday - unless you're going to CHA then we'll see you in person at our booth! Promise that the booth will look better than this desk.
